name: How to Fix Common Error Codes
description: Step-by-step troubleshooting guide for appliance and automotive error codes

step.name: Step 1: Identify the Error Code
step.text: Locate the error code on your device display. Write down the exact code (e.g., F21, P0300).

step.name: Step 2: Search the Code
step.text: Enter the error code in our search bar to find matching results.

step.name: Step 3: Check Causes
step.text: Review the listed possible causes. Start with the most common cause.

step.name: Step 4: Try DIY Solutions
step.text: If the issue is marked as 'Easy' difficulty, try the suggested solutions. Always unplug devices before working.

step.name: Step 5: Professional Help
step.text: For 'Hard' difficulty issues or if DIY fails, contact a certified technician.
